name: French Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and bake the crust according to recipe instructions. (See Light & Flaky Pie Crust recipe). Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, simmer applesauce, honey, brandy if desired, vanilla extract, and lemon rind until quite thick, about 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Arrange apples in concentric circles on top of the sauce.
6. In a 1-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, melt apricot jam, then press through a sieve. Use a pastry brush to glaze the apples with the jam.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Let cool before slicing. SERVES 8 TO 10.
